{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Your Imperial Highness
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska]] addresses [[Naberius]] as [[Your Imperial Highness]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“You okay staying with him, Your Imperial Highness?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
